title: Neutrality Redux
description: Neutrality Redux is a remake of a mod about the interaction, friendship and development of the Illager race!
body:
### Trailer
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pjfe4M4-rMM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Description
Neutrality Redux - Global mod about the development of the Illager race. With this modification you will be able to side with the Illagers by gaining reputation or "Trust Token", now when you are neutral to the Illagers you will be able to trade with them, develop the technology tree in the academy: for example, the metallurgy section will open up new types of alloys and materials for creating new tools and armor, and magic will teach you evoker spells and even reveal the craft of the totem of undying! The mod also offers to explore new, interesting, large structures with various interesting content, Neutrality Redux also adds its own quest system in the bulletin board, auto-mining blocks, mobs and bosses! The mod also complements the cut elements of the game, for example, the illusioner, from whom you can now buy a tameable destroyer, on which you can ride and rob villages! Try to fully develop the gray-nosed race in this amazing mod!

But remember, every action has consequences, if you play for the Illagers, the villagers will no longer deal with you, and the golems will attack you!

![New Structure - Illagers fortress!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/758b8596f027f7c9fbd80e4abf939ea6cf793edb.jpeg)

### Tips:
- The mod has its own sequence reflected in the achievements, there are all the necessary tips

- Items have a description, be sure to look at it, because there is a useful summary of information about the purpose of this item

- Illagers have two types of trade: random and classic! Random works almost by analogy with piglins: for example, you give the robber an emerald in his hands and he will exchange it for something. Classic trade does not open right away, you need 25 reputation!

- The order of assembling a redstone golem:
1) Spread golems legs
2) Place the body above the block between the legs
3) Add a redstone core, then a head and two arms
4) Right-click to create it!

- The arrangement of items in the ancient statue interface

![Star of Domination Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c3eba14ba00233d76395c0e7a83906ac16471f2.png)

**The mod is in the active stage of development and will be supplemented many times!**
